gold.name: Meridian Foods
claims: Meridian Foods is a regional grocery cooperative.
Meridian Foods acquired FreshCrate in March 2025 for $40 million.
Meridian Foods will keep the FreshCrate brand independent for at least two years.
Meridian Foods gained access to FreshCrate's cold-chain logistics network through the acquisition.
Meridian Foods established a new Prepared Meals division.

gold.name: FreshCrate
claims: FreshCrate was founded by Dana Okafor.
FreshCrate was acquired by Meridian Foods in March 2025.
FreshCrate operates a cold-chain logistics network that delivers refrigerated kits to 12 metropolitan areas.

gold.name: Dana Okafor
claims: Dana Okafor will join Meridian Foods as head of its new Prepared Meals division.
